title: 憧れの人の待つ高みへ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I see Satono Diamond and Mejiro
McQueen together at a cafe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Hello!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. McQueen brought me along to one of her
favorite cafes today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Order anything that tickles your fancy. Everything
on the menu is just exquisite.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much!
Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow! This place has 129 different desserts!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...And what's this? "Anyone who conquers the
entire menu will receive a special honor!" What
does that mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-well... this is only hearsay, but apparently,
anyone who eats everything on the menu is
granted the title of "maestro."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Although, it appears that no one has actually laid
claim to the title so far...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Indeed!
No one other than the (currently slenderizing)
McQueen, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How did you know that?! And why are you here in
the first place?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A title only McQueen has obtained? My interest
has definitely been piqued now!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to take on this challenge! I'll start with the
first twenty or so items on the left side of the
menu!
choice_data_list: Are you really going to do this?
Are you really going to do this?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to take on this challenge! I'll start with the
first twenty or so items on the left side of the
menu!
choice_data_list: Are you really going to do this?
Are you really going to do this?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That is a valid point... Hm, I guess I should give
up on the idea...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A sensible decision. After spending a brutal,
ten-day long struggle to conquer the challenge, I
wasn't in the best shape...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. In any case, desserts should be eaten in
moderation. Now let's just choose something we
like...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I recommend the katsudon, pickled cucumbers,
and clam soup.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the advice. Then, I'll have tho—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Those aren't even on the menu! Go home already,
Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After considering her calorie intake, Satono
Diamond eventually orders a dessert Mejiro
McQueen recommends to her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'll show you that I can mirror McQueen's
accomplishment!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I-I think this is my limit... It's like I'm being
suffocated by sugary aromas...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I guess I'm still not on your level yet, McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. It took me ten days to complete
the challenge. Attempting to eat twenty items in
one go is just...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I don't know. I'd say that was quite the feat.
Aren't you glad you have a successor now,
McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A successor?! Ohhh, my misstep has negatively
influenced the next generation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond eats a huge number of desserts.
Will she keep this up and go on to become the
second maestro?
